nl_query: Show the ltree path and level for every question in Section A of the Data Structures paper.
failed_sql: SELECT q.path, q.level FROM question q JOIN question_section qs ON q.section_id = qs.id WHERE qs.qp_id = (SELECT id FROM question_paper WHERE title = 'Data Structures' AND course_id = (SELECT id FROM academic_unit WHERE unit_type = 'COURSE' AND name = 'Computer Science')) AND qs.name = 'Section A'
